case_title: JEROME JR., APC GHIGLIOTTI J. VS. MARIA ROMANI

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,559.88 FILED BY GHIGLIOTTI, JR., APC, JEROME J. AS TO DEFENDANT ROMANI, MARIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-30-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. ALL PARTIES PRESENT TODAY IN COURT.DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. DEFENDANT'S DAUGHTER DIANA RODRIQUEZ INTERPRETS ENGLISH/SPANISH - SPANISH/ENGLISH ON HER BEHALF. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
